name: order-pending-management
description: Order Pending Management System with Google Drive integration

scripts.test-env: node -e "console.log('Testing environment...'); import('dotenv').then(dotenv => { dotenv.config(); console.log('API Key exists:', !!process.env.VITE_GOOGLE_DRIVE_API_KEY); console.log('Client ID exists:', !!process.env.VITE_GOOGLE_DRIVE_CLIENT_ID); });"
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run preview

author: Your Name
